sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49079" key="qremmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρεμμ-ατικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n49079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for cattledealing</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐργασία</foreign> Judeich <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Altertümer von Hierapolis</tr_> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,BGU:227b:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">227b7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
